div1.entryFree: Penetrate, to make a deep impression, to touch; absol.: they say it will p. Cymb. II, 3, 14. if this p. Cymb. II, 3, 14 Trans.: p. the breasts of ever angry bears, Tp. I, 2, 288. could p. her uncompassionate sire, Gent. III, 1, 231. if you can p. her with your fingering, Cymb. II, 3, 15.
